name: anarchy-ai
description: Local delivery plugin for the Anarchy AI harness and AGENTS Heuristic Underlay.

interface.shortDescription: Local harness delivery for schema reality and gov2gov reconciliation
interface.longDescription: Installs the local Anarchy AI harness surface into Codex so schema reality checks and gov2gov reconciliation can run through a local MCP lane instead of manual setup.
defaultPrompt: Check whether the schema package is real or shadow-copied.
Run gov2gov reconciliation for a copied-only schema package.
Use the local Anarchy AI harness instead of manual schema wiring.
